about: A new API, a new adapter, or an improvement to an existing one.

labels: ['enhancement']

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that AgentUI doesn't currently let you do?
     Be specific about the use case, not the solution. -->

## Proposed API or behaviour

<!-- A sketch is fine — a TS signature, a snippet of Vue template, or a
     JSON payload. We care about the shape, not the full implementation. -->

## Scope

- [ ] `@berkantdev/agentui-core`
- [ ] `@berkantdev/agentui-vue`
- [ ] `@berkantdev/agentui-nuxt`
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Storybook / playground only

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What have you already tried? Is there a workaround today? -->
